allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json for line in sys.stdin: line = line.strip\(\) if not line: continue try: obj = json.loads\(line\) role = obj.get\('type',''\) if role in ['user','assistant']: msg = obj.get\('message',{}\) content = msg.get\('content',''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c,dict\) and c.get\('type'\)=='text': print\(f'[{msg.get\(\\"role\\",\\"?\\"\)}]: {c[\\"text\\"][:300]}'\) break elif isinstance\(content, str\): print\(f'[{msg.get\(\\"role\\",\\"?\\"\)}]: {content[:300]}'\) except: pass ")
